videos.title: HTML File Paths Tutorial
videos.description: Learn how file paths work in HTML including absolute, relative, and root-relative paths.

videos.title: Understanding File Paths
videos.description: Kyle explains file paths in web development with visual examples of directory navigation.

videos.title: HTML File Paths — Best Practices
videos.description: Kevin covers best practices for organizing files and creating maintainable file path structures.

videos.title: Relative vs Absolute Paths
videos.description: Brad explains the difference between relative and absolute paths with real project examples.

videos.title: Web Development File Structure
videos.description: How to structure web development projects and manage file paths effectively.

videos.title: URL Paths Explained
videos.description: Kevin explains URL paths, how browsers resolve them, and common gotchas to avoid.
